findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "get_quote" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Request a free, no-obligation quote from Juicy Designs (a Pretoria digital marketing and design agency). Before calling, read the collected fields back to the u…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
